title: Sole Proprietorship
description: Suitable for single-founder businesses with simple registration and compliance requirements.

title: Partnership Firm
description: Suitable for businesses owned by two or more partners with a partnership agreement.

title: Limited Liability Partnership (LLP)
description: Provides limited liability protection while maintaining operational flexibility.

title: Private Limited Company
description: Preferred business structure for scalable startups seeking investors and venture capital.

title: GST Registration
description: Businesses exceeding applicable turnover thresholds or engaging in interstate trade must obtain GST registration.

title: PAN and TAN
description: Businesses require PAN for taxation, while TAN is needed for deducting and depositing TDS.

title: Trademark Registration
description: Protects the startup's brand name, logo and identity from unauthorized use.

title: Patent Protection
description: Protects novel inventions, products or technical processes developed by the startup.

title: Copyright
description: Protects software code, designs, documents and other original creative works.

title: Privacy Policy
description: Digital platforms collecting user information should publish a clear privacy policy.

title: Terms and Conditions
description: Defines the rules governing the use of the platform and protects both users and the business.

title: Data Protection Compliance
description: Businesses handling personal information should comply with applicable data protection and cybersecurity regulations.
